title: It's Raining Dogs!
description: Adds three new adorable wolf variations to your world! Requires the corresponding Resource Pack.
body:
# It's Raining Dogs! This datapack adds three new adorable wolf variants to your world. All three can be found in their own respective forested biomes. ![Three dogs sitting on top of a stone floor with logs and leaves behind them. The first dog has a golden coat, behind it are cherry leaves and logs. The second dog is black, brown and white, behind it are dark oak leaves and logs. The last dog has a merle coat pattern, behind it are birch leaves and logs.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86b6b3eb7709ecdb0302ea66262baecca05059c2.png) This datapack **requires** the [corresponding Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/project/raining-dogs-rp). The wolves will **not** look right without it! ## Variants The following variants have been added.
List of Variants
  • Tricolor Wolf: found in Dark Forests in packs of 4.
  • Merle Wolf: found in both Birch Forests in packs of 4.
  • Golden Wolf: found in Cherry Groves in packs of 2.
## Compatability with worldgen datapacks. To get the wolves to spawn naturally in their respective biomes, the biome files have been edited. This means that this datapack is **not** fully compatible with any other datapack that edits the following biomes. - `minecraft:birch_forest` - `minecraft:old_growth_birch_forest` - `minecraft:dark_forest` - `minecraft:cherry_grove` You *can* put this datapack on top of any datapack that edits these biomes, with the caveat that these biomes will be reverted back to their vanilla looks. Just with the wolves as a bonus!
